room.caption: [G5-1P] If you pay close attention to certain tiling changes, you'll find stuff in the walls. Not with this map, that wasn't a clue for this one.

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=false exitType=1 newMapX=64 newMapY=336 toRoom=rSamus5_Lv1_V x+=48
